title: phyllanthus orbiculatus
intro: Phyllanthus orbiculatus, also known as Riddell's tree or green rain tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Phyllanthus orbiculatus include the potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties.
